questions.question: Why should ML code be held to the same standards as other production code?
questions.expectedAnswer: ML code runs in production, affects users, and needs to be maintained. Untested, unreviewed ML code has the same risks as any other untested code -- bugs, regressions, and maintenance burden. Additionally, ML systems have unique risks like data drift and model degradation that require even more discipline.
questions.rubric: Must connect ML code to general software engineering standards and mention ML-specific risks
